audit_items.proof_trace: Mutex lock acquired in cache_free() is never released when do_cache_free() returns early on redzone validation failures (lines 121, 128). The unlock at line 111 is bypassed, causing resource leak.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides corrupted memory to cache_free(), triggering redzone validation failure and early return, leaving mutex locked and causing deadlock on subsequent cache operations.
